reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the practitioner to consider Ipamorelin as a selective GH-secretagogue paired with CJC-1295 — Hunter (ODWpYYPTB_8 00:08:14.040): "ipamorelin or ipamorelin and CJC, they're just going to be better at everything" and Trevor (m_GpIdkHI4M 00:17:30.880): "CJC-1295 with DAC and Ipamorelin, they're married. They're joined at the hip. It's like conjoined twins. You do not take one without the other." We'd ask the prescribing physician to weigh dose anchoring against Hunter's 2025 email canon — Hunter email threadId 1952050e9ec0021f (2025-02-19): "Recommended doses are 100-300mcg at night before bed" — and to consider the female lean toward Ipamorelin over Tesamorelin per Hunter email threadId 1952050e9ec0021f (2025-02-19): "women tend to have a slightly better response to Ipamorelin."
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Insulin-sensitivity / diabetes caution: Hunter email threadId 1952050e9ec0021f (2025-02-19): "Potential alterations in insulin sensitivity, necessitating caution for individuals with diabetes."
- Injection-site / route: Hunter email threadId 1952050e9ec0021f (2025-02-19): "Mild swelling or irritation may occur with improper administration (if this happens, try it IM instead of subq)."
- Mild fatigue: Hunter email threadId 1952050e9ec0021f (2025-02-19): "Some users report mild fatigue due to changes in GH and metabolic activity."
- Standalone-vs-stack ceiling: Trevor (m_GpIdkHI4M 00:17:36.840): "You do not take one without the other. Don't do it. It's just a waste of your time. You're You're limiting what your body is capable of by orders of magnitude."
- HGH likely superior past mid-50s: Hunter (4igc2UpFr7Q 00:17:09.400): "HGH, especially for someone that's 55, is always going to be better" — though Hunter (4igc2UpFr7Q 00:17:38.000): "Ipamorelin and Tesamorelin are fine, but for someone that's 55, the body of a 55-year-old is going to respond at the right dose probably much much better."
- CJC-flushing / heart-rate (when stacked): Taylor (JC1poI1OEog 00:13:19.280): "the CJC can cause a flushing reaction. It can cause increased heart rate and that can kind of freak people out." Taylor's mitigation: Taylor (JC1poI1OEog 00:13:19.280): "I'd say just start with Ipamorelin, see how you do with that."
- Cycling discipline: Taylor (gCJLLBdAK0k 00:08:31.080): "each of these peptides you want to do an 8 week rotation so that means you're going to be taking these for eight weeks on and you're going to rotate taking 8 weeks off the reason why it's so important to make sure that you're rotating a 8 week 8 week on rotation with peptides is because your body can come adapted to it which means that eventually you will it will stop having an effect."
- Receptor desensitization on chronic GHRP class: Hunter (ODWpYYPTB_8 00:08:14.040): "both ghrelin receptor desensitization with chronic use uh, requires dose escalation over time, which is again a fundamental design flaw."
- Hunter's 2023 baseline_protocol vial cycle: "Frequency" "5 days on, 2 days off"; "Duration" "8 weeks on, 8 weeks off" — to be revisited against newer Trevor framing of CJC+Ipa as a long-term restorative stack (m_GpIdkHI4M 00:35:13.080): "This is going to restore the master youth hormone access."
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_consensus: All three converge on selectivity and the CJC-1295 pairing. reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_disagreement: Dose anchor differs across experts. Hunter's 2023 baseline_protocol lists "Dose" "300 mcg" with "AM/PM" timing; Hunter's 2025 email canon (threadId 1952050e9ec0021f, 2025-02-19): "Recommended doses are 100-300mcg at night before bed" (newer narrows to single bedtime dose, 2023 cheat-sheet allowed AM/PM split). Hunter's blend dose (threadId 19621e264ba38f4e, 2025-04-10): "Draw up 20 units (600mcg of Tesamorelin and 200mcg of ipamorelin) (0.2ml)… Inject subcutaneously every night before bed" — anchors the practical ipamorelin dose at 200 mcg/night when blended 3:1. Trevor in the same canonical Ipa video does not give a clean Ipa-alone microgram dose, but reframes the duration to the long-haul: Trevor (m_GpIdkHI4M 00:35:13.080): "CJC-1295 with DAC and Ipamorelin. This is going to restore the master youth hormone access" — implying chronic-restorative, not the 8-on/8-off cycling Hunter's 2023 cheat-sheet listed. Taylor's reported case-doses cluster at 250-500 mcg and 10 units: Taylor (Cg7JtpnfRY4 01:50:35.280): "Started Ipamorelin 3 weeks ago, 10 units at night, 5 days on, 2 days off. It's a good ratio, in my opinion" and Taylor (hgI5Mpc-xDQ 00:47:21.839): "I'm finishing CJC and IPA 250 micrograms a day." Older Hunter framing in the "Overrated" video adds the desensitization caveat (Hunter ODWpYYPTB_8 00:08:14.040): "both ghrelin receptor desensitization with chronic use uh, requires dose escalation over time" — which sits in tension with Trevor's "forever" restorative framing and is closer to Taylor's 8-on/8-off cycling discipline (Taylor gCJLLBdAK0k 00:08:31.080): "each of these peptides you want to do an 8 week rotation." Female fat-loss preference also splits: Hunter (4igc2UpFr7Q 00:20:15.160): "for belly fat specifically, we do have more data around tesamorelin… they might do better with CJC-1295 and Ipamorelin, but I would say clinically speaking, tesamorelin is going to be better for getting rid of visceral belly fat" — Taylor inverts that for women: Taylor (yo-VH6HFJSQ 00:06:14.440): "I like for women um Tes Morin I like that more for men for women I really want you guys to focus on the ipam maralin um this is going to be the best for leaning out your muscle."
